advancements.ascension.root.welcome: Welcome to the world of Ascension! We hope you will cultivate to immortality!
ascension.deathrecall.bind_message: §5§oThe talisman absorbs the essence of your death...
ascension.deathrecall.bound_on_respawn: §5Death Recall Talisman has bound to your demise...
ascension.deathrecall.dimension_invalid: §cThe death dimension is no longer accessible
ascension.deathrecall.no_location: §cNo death location bound to this talisman
ascension.deathrecall.success: §aReturned to the site of your demise
ascension.harmony_pill.not_elemental_bod: You do not possess an Elemental Body physique.
ascension.item.five_element_harmony_pill: Consume to undergo the Five Palace Immortal Body transformation.
ascension.message.physique.soul_crowned_: %s has become the %s. Tremble beneath their Throne!
ascension.message.physique.world_dominat: %s has become the %s. Bear witness to their Ascension!
ascension.message.physique_evolution.ble: The Blessed path has been stained by blood, and You no longer have a future with Virtue.
The Blessed path has been stained by undead blood, your rage and wrath fueling your Virtue.
ascension.message.physique_evolution.blo: Blood stains your mortal frame... %s/%s sacrifices gathered.
Your Blood Fiend physique hungers for a deeper crimson... %s/%s sacrifices gathered.
Your soul is too shallow to birth a Blood Wraith. Soul Path Major Realm %s required.
ascension.message.physique_evolution.ess: Heavenly lightning brands your Essence Bone. Enter the Crimson Lotus Flame and begin the Divine ritual.
The Divine Bone ritual starves. Consume refinement pills to fuel the crimson flame.
Your Essence Bone is being purified beneath heaven... %s/%s minutes.
ascension.message.physique_evolution.pac: You have failed to maintain a peaceful streak.
ascension.message.physique_evolution.yin: Your eyes stir. A breakthrough will complete the balance.
ascension.physique_essence.tooltip.fuse: Right-click to merge into a compatible physique
ascension.physiques.academic_spirit.desc: Knowledge occupies your Soul, a library resonating within your Mind
A library resonates within your soul.
ascension.physiques.arrow_blessed.desc: Your breath stills before release, and your Qi gathers naturally along the path of the arrow.
ascension.physiques.ashen_soul_flame.des: A pale flame burns within your soul, neither warm nor kind, feeding on impurities until only ash remains.
Ashen flame burns within your soul.
ascension.physiques.blessed.desc: Virtue clings to your body like morning light, marking you as one who may walk a higher path.
ascension.physiques.blood_fiend.desc: Blood whispers to your soul, promising strength through hunger, violence, and the red road beneath morality.
ascension.physiques.blood_wraith.desc: You have become a thing of blood and malice, your soul drifting between slaughter, hunger, and demonic power.
ascension.physiques.blood_wraith.desc.sh: Your soul has become blood-soaked and demonic.
ascension.physiques.bruised_knuckle_body: Your fists have learned through pain. Every bruise has hardened into another lesson carved into the body.
Your fists grow stronger through pain.
ascension.physiques.clear_spirit.desc: Your soul is unusually clear, untouched by much of the noise that clouds lesser minds.
ascension.physiques.clear_spirit.desc.sh: Your soul is clear and steady.
ascension.physiques.corrupted_entity.des: Through a series of experiments and tests, a highly talented being has been artificially created, but something is lacking, missing. Finding it could not only complete the being, but further enhance them.
A strange being born incomplete from demonic experiments.
ascension.physiques.cripple.desc.short: Blocked Meridians, Shattered Marrow, and many other ailments destroyed your talent, stripping you of your ability to cultivate.
ascension.physiques.crystal_soul.desc: The soul is as clear and pure as the most vibrant, stunning gemstone, a veritable crystal through and through, lacking any influence from the harshness of the world.
ascension.physiques.crystal_soul.desc.sh: A soul without impurities, a stunning gemstone in a world of want.
ascension.physiques.decaying_meridians.d: Meridians naturally born in a perpetual state of decay, fragments of dead cells being melted into the qi. Rumors float about of a pill that can cure this condition and evolve it.
Born with dying meridians, which infect your qi.
You possess a Divine Essence Bone, wielding endless talent and an absolute attraction to Essence.
You possess a Divine Essence Bone
ascension.physiques.dreaming_soul.desc: Your soul drifts close to the border of dream and waking, sensing truths that conscious minds often miss.
ascension.physiques.dual_soul.desc: Two beings were conceived, but only one was born. Having consumed your sibling in the womb, you carry a portion of their soul with you.
ascension.physiques.dull_mind.desc: Even the most robust frames cannot function without a strong mind commanding it. Your is one for want...
ascension.physiques.dull_mind.desc.short: A strong body but lacking in intelligence.
ascension.physiques.earth_attuned.desc: Innately, you feel a deep connection to earth, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.earth_body.desc: Your bones are heavy with the patience of mountains. You do not fall — you are the ground others fall upon.
ascension.physiques.earth_body.desc.shor: Your body is as immovable as the earth.
ascension.physiques.fire_attuned.desc: Innately, you feel a deep connection to fire, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.fire_body.desc: Your body resonates with the flame. Fire is no longer an element — it is an extension of your will, a furnace that never cools.
ascension.physiques.fire_body.desc.short: Your body is one with fire.
ascension.physiques.five_palace_immortal: You have unified the five elemental palaces within your body. Fire, Water, Wood, Earth, and Metal no longer conflict — they cycle endlessly, each feeding the next. The realm trembles before a body that is all things at once.
Five elements unified, the palaces complete.
ascension.physiques.flame_touched.desc: A faint ember sleeps beneath your skin, warming your flesh and drawing Fire Qi toward you like sparks to dry wood.
ascension.physiques.flame_touched.desc.s: Your body carries a small ember of Fire Qi.
ascension.physiques.flow_severing_eyes.d: Your eyes trace the hidden flow of battle, finding the thin lines where movement, Qi, and flesh may be severed.
Your eyes perceive the flow of combat.
ascension.physiques.generous_spirit.desc: Since birth you have been kind and generous, sharing everything you own. This virtuous nature has seeped into your very soul.
ascension.physiques.hardened_general.des: Years and years on the mortal battlefield have shaped your body, wielding the spear with unnatural accuracy and skill.
Good with spear, late to essence cultivation.
ascension.physiques.heavenly_essence_bon: You possess a Heavenly Essence Bone, wielding supreme talent and a powerful attraction to Essence.
You possess a Heavenly Essence Bone
ascension.physiques.iron_bulwark_spine.d: Your spine carries the weight of a fortress, letting you stand firm where others would break.
Your spine is like an iron bulwark.
ascension.physiques.lightning_attuned.de: Innately, you feel a deep connection to lightning, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.metal_attuned.desc: Innately, you feel a deep connection to metals, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.metal_body.desc: Your flesh has been tempered like iron from the forge. Each blow that should break you only refines your edge.
ascension.physiques.metal_body.desc.shor: Your body is forged and unyielding.
ascension.physiques.molten_casted.desc: Using lava as a crucible to melt the body then quenching it in water, treat the body as steel, reforging it into something better.
ascension.physiques.molten_casted.desc.s: A melting and quenching strengthened the body
ascension.physiques.mortal.description: so fragile yet... full of potential
You possess a mortal Essence Bone, wielding average talent and a minor attraction to Essence.
ascension.physiques.myriad_poison_vessel: A cursed and coveted constitution born once in ten thousand generations. This body does not resist poison - it hungers for it, drinking in every, toxin, plague and miasma to refine them into peerless venom. What kills others only makes this body stronger.
A body that absorbs all poisons and refines them into powder.
ascension.physiques.pointed_eyes.desc: Your gaze narrows like a spear tip, fixing on weakness with cold and piercing focus.
ascension.physiques.pointed_eyes.desc.sh: Your eyes seek the perfect thrust.
ascension.physiques.severed_meridians.de: Your meridians have been torn apart, leaving your Qi unable to flow freely. Yet through pain, the body may still crawl toward power.
Your meridians are damaged, but your body still endures.
ascension.physiques.soul_crowned_king.de: You are the Peak of the Soul, Your Throne built on rivers of fallen Kings. Souls tremble before Your might.
ascension.physiques.soul_gaze.desc: Your eyes do not merely see flesh and movement. They peer toward the flicker of the soul beneath.
ascension.physiques.soul_sword_heart.des: Your soul has taken the shape of a sword, straight, sharp, and unwilling to bend before heaven or man.
Your soul carries a sword heart.
ascension.physiques.spear_soul_mark.desc: A spear mark is branded upon your soul, urging your will forward with piercing, relentless purpose.
Your soul bears a spear mark.
ascension.physiques.special_essence_bone: You possess a Special Essence Bone, wielding extraordinary talent and a strong attraction to Essence.
You possess a Special Essence Bone
ascension.physiques.stone_monkey.desc: Born from the Universe and Stone, you are as strong as the Earth and as limber as a Monkey.
ascension.physiques.stone_monkey.desc.sh: You are born from Stone and Universe
ascension.physiques.sword_apprentice.des: A natural trait some have which grants them an innate understanding and appreciation for the Sword.
ascension.physiques.sword_bone.desc: Sword intent has settled into your bones, making every movement feel one breath closer to the blade.
ascension.physiques.sword_bone.desc.shor: Your bones resonate with Sword Qi.
ascension.physiques.sword_monster.desc: Forsaking all other paths and delving only into the Sword, their nature twists and their body remolds itself, becoming a living sword. Their every bone possesses sharpness, their gaze piercing and their steps cutting.
ascension.physiques.sword_monster.desc.s: Living by the Sword, becoming a Sword.
ascension.physiques.thin_sword_pulse.des: A narrow pulse of sword intent beats through your meridians, subtle but dangerously precise.
ascension.physiques.thuggish_form.desc: A strong and broad body, with naturally tough muscles and vast veins.
ascension.physiques.thundering_soul_core: Thunder coils around the core of your soul, shaking loose fear, doubt, and the fragile wills of others.
ascension.physiques.titan_born.desc: A mutation born from the blessings of the Heavens, wielding immense innate physical prowess and stature, but lacking in all other ways.
ascension.physiques.titan_born.desc.shor: Blessed by the Heavens with an immense body.
ascension.physiques.twisted_vessels.desc: Meridians naturally born twisted and coiled around itself, hampering and inhibiting the flow of Qi, but somehow letting more and more Qi in... Rumors float about of a pill that can cure this condition and evolve it.
Born with twisted meridians, despite massive natural talent with Essence.
ascension.physiques.tyrant_body.desc: Strong as an Ox, domineering as Liu Bu. You are tyranny incarnate.
ascension.physiques.virtuoso_buddha.desc: Your body has become a vessel of serene power, its strength guided by mercy, discipline, and radiant virtue.
ascension.physiques.water_attuned.desc: Innately, you feel a deep connection to water, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.water_body.desc: Your flesh flows like still water over stone. You do not strike — you seep, wearing away all resistance in time.
ascension.physiques.water_body.desc.shor: Your body moves with the river.
ascension.physiques.weak_soul.desc: Innately born with a fragile soul, you find yourself drawn to cultivating it, improving it and making it sturdy and mystical.
ascension.physiques.weak_soul.desc.short: You have a weak soul with potential.
ascension.physiques.wild_cleaver_veteran: Your body remembers brutal battles and heavy blades, favoring savage cuts over graceful form.
Your body favors wild blade arts.
ascension.physiques.wind_attuned.desc: Innately, you feel a deep connection to wind, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.wood_attuned.desc: Innately, you feel a deep connection to nature, its very presence opening your pores and drawing in more Qi.
ascension.physiques.wood_body.desc: Life pulses through your meridians like sap through ancient roots. You endure not by force, but by growth.
ascension.physiques.wood_body.desc.short: Your body holds the vitality of ancient wood.
ascension.physiques.world_dominator.desc: You are the Dominator of Worlds, the Lord of all Flesh and Blood. Feel the earth quake under Your might.
ascension.physiques.wrathful_vajra.desc: Your compassion has teeth. Like a vajra in motion, your body crushes evil with sacred wrath.
ascension.physiques.yang_eyes.desc: Eyes born of sunlit intensity. The soul burns with potential, but remains incomplete without its counterpart.
ascension.physiques.yang_eyes.desc.short: A half-formed gaze. Equip a moon technique and maintain it for 20 minutes to awaken it.
ascension.physiques.yin_eyes.desc: Eyes born of moonlit stillness. The soul cultivates, but slowly — as if waiting for something to complete it.
ascension.physiques.yin_eyes.desc.short: A half-formed gaze. Equip a sun technique and maintain it for 20 minutes to awaken it.
ascension.physiques.yin_yang_eyes.desc: The divided gaze has found its balance. Moon and sun, stillness and fire — both paths now flow without resistance.
ascension.physiques.yin_yang_eyes.desc.s: Balanced sight. Soul and Essence cultivation flow freely.
ascension.pill_effects.blinded_senses_pi: Your senses have been dulled by a foreign pill.
ascension.pill_effects.corrosive_poison_: A corrosive poison eats away at your armor from a foreign pill.
ascension.pill_effects.cracked_meridian_: Your meridians have been damaged by a foreign pill.
ascension.pill_effects.crimson_lotus_bon: Fuels the Divine Essence Bone ritual when consumed after heavenly lightning has marked the body.
ascension.pill_effects.frost_silkworm_po: Frost silkworm venom chills your meridians from a foreign pill.
ascension.pill_effects.paralyzed_body_pi: Your body has been paralyzed by a foreign pill.
ascension.pill_effects.parasite_pill_eff: Infects targets with a qi devouring parasite
ascension.pill_effects.scorching_yang_po: Scorching yang energy floods your body from a foreign pill.
ascension.pill_effects.venomous_meridian: Venom flows through your meridians from a foreign pill.
ascension.skill.air_step.description: Circulate qi through your body to step onto the air.
ascension.skill.axe_mastery_skill.descri: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Axe.
ascension.skill.blade_mastery_skill.desc: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Blade.
ascension.skill.blinded_senses_debuff.de: A fog veils the world from your sight, restricting and limiting you.
ascension.skill.bloodfeast_banquet.descr: §4Draw upon the life-force of nearby creatures, feasting on their blood to fuel your cultivation. The greater your realm, the wider your table.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation.descrip: §6The cycle closes — liver, heart, spleen, lung, kidney — each giving way to the next without interruption. Nothing is lost between them; every trial is carried forward and returned as strength.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_earth.d: §6The spleen settles deep and unmoving, each blow sinking into the body without shaking its foundation.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_earth_m: §6Spleen anchors as lungs compress. Each blow is taken in and condensed, the body growing dense and unyielding.
§6The spleen bears the weight as the lungs compress it, the kidneys drawing everything deeper. What is suffered no longer leaves — it settles within.
§6What the spleen endures, the lungs condense, the kidneys sink, and the liver reshapes. The body follows a rhythm it no longer resists.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_fire.de: §6The heart burns with every strike, its heat sinking into the flesh and tempering it from within.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_fire_ea: §6The heart burns while the spleen holds firm beneath it. Heat settles into flesh that does not give, thickening under each strike.
§6The heart burns inward, held fast by the spleen, until the lungs refine what remains. The body becomes like ore — only what endures is left behind.
§6The heart ignites it, the spleen holds it, the lungs refine it, and the kidneys carry it onward. The body is forged again and again without rest.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_metal.d: §6The lungs refine with every breath, each strike shaving away weakness and leaving something sharper behind.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_metal_w: §6The lungs refine as the kidneys carry away. What remains is cleaner and sharper, the body honed through loss and renewal.
§6The lungs sharpen, the kidneys carry, and the liver reshapes what flows through them. The body yields where needed and hardens where it must.
§6The lungs carve the edge, the kidneys bear the flow, the liver gives it form, and the heart drives it forward. Each force supports the others, holding the body together.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_water.d: §6The kidneys draw away what should not remain, each wound leaving the body clearer than before.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_water_w: §6Kidneys nourish what the liver shapes. What sinks into the body returns as quiet strength, growing beneath the surface.
§6From kidney to liver to heart, the cycle turns without pause. What is damaged passes through it and returns transformed.
§6The kidneys set it in motion, the liver raises it, the heart ignites it, and the spleen brings it to rest. Change flows cleanly, each phase reinforcing the next.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_wood.de: §6The liver endures strain without breaking, the body growing stronger each time it is forced to bend.
ascension.skill.body_cultivation_wood_fi: §6Liver feeds heart, and heart answers with flame. Growth and fire take hold together, the body enduring without withering.
§6Liver kindles the heart, and the flame settles into the spleen. Growth feeds fire, and fire is given form, layering strength with every trial.
§6It begins in the liver and passes forward — heart, spleen, then lung — each taking its turn. The body is carried through the sequence, each cycle leaving it harder to break.
ascension.skill.bow_mastery_skill.descri: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Bow.
Slowly drains your gear of durability.
ascension.skill.cracked_meridians_debuff: As opposing energy floods your Meridians, they crack and break, weakening your body.
ascension.skill.cultivation_skill.descri: Allows you to cultivate the %s path.
ascension.skill.earth_essence_cultivatio: Cultivates Essence through stone, soil, depth, and grounded stillness.
ascension.skill.enter_spirit_form.descri: Project your Spirit from your Body.
ascension.skill.fire_essence_cultivation: Cultivates Essence through fire. 75% base speed, 150% while burning, and 225% while in lava.
ascension.skill.fire_spray.description: Condense a beam of Fire Qi and advance fearlessly.
ascension.skill.five_element_circulation: Cultivate the Essence through the Five Elements, harmonising and uniting them.
ascension.skill.frost_silkworm_poison_de: A silkworm's frost seeps into your meridians, freezing Qi and body alike. Cannot be cleansed. Leads only to death.
ascension.skill.frost_silkworm_poison_te: A concentrated burst of silkworm frost. The cold builds quickly — flee before it reaches your core.
ascension.skill.gale_step.description: Surges forward on wind qi, pushing nearby enemies aside and softening your fall.
ascension.skill.gibbous_moon_cultivation: You cannot cultivate the Gibbous Moon Scripture indoors.
Cultivates the Soul by drawing upon the swelling power of the gibbous moon. Must be practised under open sky. Greatly empowered when gazing directly at the moon. Harmful beneath direct sunlight.
ascension.skill.lightning_essence_cultiv: Cultivates Essence through thunderous resonance. It cultivates normally at rest, faster beneath storms, and surges after being struck by lightning outside tribulations.
ascension.skill.mace_mastery_skill.descr: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Mace.
ascension.skill.marrow_furnace.descripti: Burns qi through the bones when dealing damage, refining the body path. The effect strengthens while below half health.
ascension.skill.metal_essence_cultivatio: Cultivates Essence through nearby ores and condensed mineral power.
ascension.skill.pale_moon_cultivation_sk: You cannot cultivate the Pale Moon Scripture indoors.
Cultivates the Soul by drawing upon pale lunar essence. Must be practised under open sky. Stronger when gazing directly at the moon. Harmful beneath direct sunlight.
ascension.skill.paralyzed_body_debuff.de: An opposing energy floods your Body, halting your movement.
ascension.skill.poison_refining_meditati: A passive technique of the Myriad Venom Scripture. When a poison source is consumed, Qi is spent to refine the toxin — converting it directly into realm progress on the Poison Path. Stronger poisons demand more Qi but yield far greater cultivation. Higher pill realm and purity dramatically scale the gain. Breakthrough requires the body to have refined sufficient poison in total.
ascension.skill.qi_devouring_parasite_de: Slowly Devours your internal energy until empty, Then it takes your life energy.
ascension.skill.qi_sustained_body.descri: Your body is sustained by Qi, removing the need for ordinary food.
ascension.skill.regeneration_boost.descr: Your refined body slowly restores lost health over time.
ascension.skill.scholarly_soul_cultivati: Cultivates the Soul path through study and understanding. Higher realms require recovered chapters.
ascension.skill.scorching_yang_debuff.de: Scorches the target with Extreme Yang that bypasses Immunities!
ascension.skill.simple_soul_cultivation_: A basic soul cultivation method. Quiet the body, steady the spirit, and draw soul essence into your foundation.
ascension.skill.soul_forge.description: Bind a weapon into your soul, then summon or dismiss it.
ascension.skill.soul_forge.returned_from: Your soul weapon refuses to be stored away.
ascension.skill.soul_forge.unsummoned: Your soul weapon returns to your soul.
ascension.skill.soul_forge.weapon_unboun: Your soul weapon fades as the Soul Forge art leaves you.
ascension.skill.soul_lantern.description: Marks the soul of a nearby target, revealing it and weakening its body for a short time.
ascension.skill.soul_needle.description: Pierces a target's soul with focused spiritual force.
ascension.skill.soul_suppression.descrip: Releases spiritual pressure, damaging and weakening nearby enemies.
ascension.skill.spear_mastery_skill.desc: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Spear.
ascension.skill.stone_root.description: While grounded and still, roots your body like stone and grants brief resistance.
One swing splits air.
Ten swings shape the blade.
A hundred swings carve skill.
A thousand swings awaken intent.
Ten thousand swings… heaven yields to the sword.
ascension.skill.sword_draw.description: Unsheathe in an instant, surging forward and carving through enemies along your path.
ascension.skill.sword_mastery_skill.desc: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Sword.
ascension.skill.thorn_bind.description: Binds a target with wood qi, heavily slowing and poisoning them for a short time.
ascension.skill.thunder_palm.description: Strikes a nearby target with lightning qi, damaging and briefly slowing them.
ascension.skill.trident_mastery_skill.de: As your worldview and realm increase, so to does your command over the Trident.
ascension.skill.true_flight.description: Grants the ability to fly freely.
ascension.skill.turbid_energy_purge.desc: Slowly burns away harmful effects through purified white martial energy.
ascension.skill.vajra_breathing_cultivat: The cultivator breathes with the stillness of vajra, turning pain into refinement. Taking significant damage consumes Qi and grants Body cultivation progress, with greater gains while unarmed, unarmored, and walking the path of restraint.
ascension.skill.venomous_meridians_debuf: As opposing energy floods your Meridians, corroding your flesh and blood.
ascension.skill.verdant_recovery.descrip: Slowly regenerates health while surrounded by plant life.
ascension.skill.water_essence_cultivatio: Cultivates Essence through water. 80% base speed and 130% while submerged in water
ascension.skill.white_lightning_cultivat: Cultivates the Body through white martial lightning, gaining speed while unarmed or purifying harmful effects.
ascension.skill.white_lightning_fist.des: An unarmed strike that releases purified white martial energy into the target's body.
ascension.skill.wind_essence_cultivation: Cultivates Essence through open sky and high altitude. It weakens in enclosed spaces and strengthens the higher you stand beneath the wind.
ascension.skill.wood_essence_cultivation: Cultivates Essence through nearby plants, trees, and living growth.
ascension.soulanchor.already_used: §cThis talisman has already spent its soul.
ascension.soulanchor.dimension_invalid: §cAnchor dimension no longer exists — talisman failed.
ascension.soulanchor.no_anchor: §7No anchor set. Shift-right-click to bind one.
ascension.technique.bloodfeast_soul_refi:
§4By feasting on the vital essence of nearby creatures the cultivator advances at an
extraordinary pace. Yet the path is stained crimson each higher realm demands
proof of the hunt, and those who hunt only their fellow cultivators grow ever more
fearsome with each slaughter.
§4A heretical scripture that refines the soul through the blood of the slain.
ascension.technique.dawning_sun_scriptur: Cultivates the Soul by drawing upon the warmth of the dawning sun. Must be practised under open sky. Cultivation rate increases when gazing directly at the sun. Harmful beneath moonlit night skies.
A soul cultivation method strengthened beneath the rising sun.
ascension.technique.earth_essence_techni: An Earth-aligned Essence technique. It cultivates steadily at rest, faster on natural ground, and fastest while deep underground.
Cultivates Essence through earth, stone, and underground exploration.
ascension.technique.fire_essence_techniq: A Fire-aligned Essence technique. It cultivates slowly at rest, faster while burning, and fastest while submerged in lava.
Cultivates Essence through flame, burning, and lava immersion.
ascension.technique.gibbous_moon_scriptu: A stronger lunar soul scripture attuned to the gibbous moon.
ascension.technique.hellbound_marrow_scr: A brutal body scripture that burns qi through the bones, refining flesh and marrow through violence, pain, and survival.
Refines the body through pain and violent qi combustion.
ascension.technique.indestructible_vajra: The Indestructible Vajra Scripture refines the body through discipline, restraint, and purified qi. By enduring hardship without relying on weapons or armor, the cultivator strengthens their flesh, burns away turbid energy, and awakens the unshaking force of the vajra body.
A Body/Buddhist technique that tempers flesh and virtue through restraint.
ascension.technique.lightning_essence_te: A lightning-aligned Essence technique. When under thundering skies, or when struck by lightning, experience a boost in cultivation speed.
Cultivates Essence through Lightning and Storms.
ascension.technique.metal_essence_techni: A Metal-aligned Essence technique. It cultivates slowly at rest, faster near ores, and fastest within rich mineral deposits.
Cultivates Essence through metal, ores, and natural veins.
ascension.technique.myriad_venom_refinem: An ancient and reviled cultivation method that treats the body as a living crucible. Rather than avoiding poison, the practitioner consumes it — forcing Qi to refine every toxin into pure cultivation energy. The more poison the body has endured, the faster it advances. Those who walk this path do not resist the world's blight. They become it.
Consume poisons to cultivate. Qi refines each toxin into realm progress. Higher realm and purity pills yield far greater gains.
Cultivates the Soul path by drawing upon pale lunar essence. Must be practised under open sky. Cultivation rate increases when gazing directly at the moon. Harmful beneath direct sunlight.
A soul cultivation method strengthened beneath moonlight.
ascension.technique.scholarly_soul_techn: Cultivates the Soul path through study, observation, and refined understanding, surrounded by knowledge. Higher realms require missing chapters of the scripture.
A soul cultivation scripture whose later chapters are scattered across the world.
ascension.technique.soul_forged_weapon_m: A hybrid soul and weapon technique that tempers a bound weapon through battle and soul cultivation.
Binds a weapon into the cultivator's soul.
ascension.technique.water_essence_techni: A Water-aligned Essence technique. It cultivates steadily at rest and faster while submerged in water.
Cultivates Essence through stillness, flow, and water immersion.
ascension.technique.white_lightning_ten_: The White Lightning Ten-Stage Technique uses brain energy and white martial lightning to refine the body, burn away turbid energy, and sharpen unarmed combat without causing bodily transformations.
A Body/Fist technique that refines the nerves and flesh through pure white martial energy.
ascension.technique.wind_essence_techniq: A wind-aligned Essence technique. It cultivates slowly at sea level, faster higher up, and fastest beyond cloud layer.
Cultivates Essence through wind, air, and whirlwinds.
ascension.technique.wood_essence_techniq: A Wood-aligned Essence technique. It cultivates slowly at rest, faster near plant life, and fastest within dense natural growth.
Cultivates Essence through wood, nature, and life-force.
ascension.technique.zenith_sun_scripture: Cultivates the Soul by drawing upon the blazing power of the sun at its peak. Must be practised under open sky. Greatly empowered when gazing directly at the sun. Harmful beneath moonlit night skies.
A stronger solar soul scripture attuned to the sun at its zenith.
